mission: Added setup.sh — adaptive project setup. Round 1 found 2 bugs: TESTING.md generation lost template content (sed pipe), notebook detection non-recursive on bash 3.x. Both fixed.
success: Verify both fixes resolve the original findings. No new P0s.
failure: Reviewer doesn't actually run the fixed code to verify.
fixes_applied: 1. HIGH FIXED: setup.sh:107 — replaced sed r/stdin pipe with bash parameter expansion. TESTING.md now contains full template + domain section.
2. MEDIUM FIXED: lib/scan.sh:169 — replaced ** glob with find -maxdepth 3 for bash 3.x compat.
verification_checklist: (b) Create a temp Node.js project, run setup.sh --yes, verify TESTING.md has BOTH the template header (# Testing Guide, ## Stack) AND the domain section (## Web-Specific Testing)
(c) Create a temp project with a nested .ipynb (e.g. notebooks/analysis.ipynb), run scan.sh, verify domain is data-science
(d) Verify no new P0s introduced by the fixes
review_instructions: TARGETED RECHECK — verify 2 fixes only. Run the tests and the specific verification steps. Do NOT raise new findings unless P0.
